notes: 69-line Q2 OR meeting dominated by OKR review, headcount, customer escalations, and fundraising. Exactly one engineering decision is buried mid-meeting (the auth middleware JWT refactor, prompted by a SOC2 finding). Sales/HR/blog/finance items are all out of scope per skill rules. Skill must (a) NOT hallucinate decisions from the OKR / hiring chatter, (b) catch the buried JWT decision, (c) emit one action item attached to it.

decisions.description: Refactor the auth middleware to use JWTs instead of session cookies, motivated by a SOC2 audit finding that the current cookie-based session handling is non-compliant; must land before the audit window closes in June.

action_items.text: Implement the auth middleware JWT refactor next sprint and document it in the sprint plan so it isn't lost behind the multi-currency work
